thesis: the skill is maintaining the calibration, not having it once.
audience: Audience: operators, team leads, and founders redesigning AI-assisted workflows.
whyItMatters: If you have a 100 streams of agent output and 8 hours a day, you cannot review everything at the same depth.
supportPoints: The skill is going to be triaging your own attention in real time.

If you run an organization, the question isn't are we using AI.
